title: Manufacturing Engineer - EPC Industrie International Enterprises - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - EPC Industrie International Enterprises - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About EPC Industrie International Enterprises:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie International Enterprises!
